creator: peo@intersonic.se
text:
Misleading directory name, www/horde4-base actually installs horde5

Should be www/horde5-base or possibly www/horde-base IMHO.

From the svn log:

Revision 308772 - (view) (download) (annotate) - [select for diffs]
Modified Wed Dec 12 15:16:56 2012 UTC (5 days, 8 hours ago) by mm
File length: 1696 byte(s)
Diff to previous 307554

Update horde4 packages and applications to horde5

Fix: 

Change the port directory name.
